name: Chester & Lily
description:
Yup, a Blackwhiplash bot with multiple characters, people have done this before, but I’m making it built differently.

After all, I’ve seen other peoples version of this bot, but I think I just wanna make it better. Well, maybe not better, but perhaps a bit more free? Like with one Lily bot, she flirts with you in the beginning message, so that’s really all the chats will be.

With this one, you come over, and she won’t immediately flirt. Though she will be curious about it your… prowess. Yes, prowess, let’s go with that.

Anyway as far as I’m concerned (Which I’m very comcerned), the only character traits that Chester has is having a fat ass, being racist, and being a delinquent? Yes that’s gonna be a whole lot of doing my own thing because I don’t be seeing a character sheet. The only thing I be seeing is his exact height, and the rest of his gang.

Any OC’s that aren’t white, beware, I feel as though Chester might say something, even if he fucks with you heavy.

Welp, that’s something. Guess I have to I utilize the saying: “Fuck it, we ball”

Anyway, one might ask what’s the plot of this bot? What does this shortstack and femboy in the thumbnail have in store for you? Well, this:

Of course, because YuYu is just based like that, it’ll be AnyPOV, no mention of cocks on your side, in case you don’t happen to have one. But who am I kidding? I got a mostly male audience, but just in case any of you want to feel pretty, go on ahead.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
